title: Aster DM Healthcare is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Aster DM Healthcare is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Aster DM Healthcare has an exciting opening for a Consultant Physician at our Mysuru office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Aster DM Healthcare:
Aster DM Healthcare is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Patient Care

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aster DM Healthcare!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
